snippet.title: Battlefield 6 Season 4 Naval Official Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Naval warfare has arrived, bringing all-out combat across land, air, and sea. 

Deploy to Tsuru Reef, our biggest battlefield yet, where sprawling islands, dynamic waves, boats, jets, helicopters, and ground vehicles collide in massive battles. Command the coastline with the RCB-90 Patrol Boat or race through the surf in the 7.7m NSW RHIB. 

Expand your arsenal with four new weapons, including the long-range Interdictor sniper rifle, then climb the ranks in a brand-new Ranked Battle Royale season packed with fresh rewards. And later in the season, Wake Island returns. 

Prepare to deploy when Season 4 launches on July 21.

#Battlefield6

snippet.title: Queens of the Stone Age - Easy Street (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Featuring Nikki Lane 
Stream "Easy Street": https://qotsa.lnk.to/easystreet 

See QOTSA on tour https://qotsa.com/tour/ 
Follow QOTSA: http://www.qotsa.com/ 
https://www.facebook.com/QOTSA 
https://www.instagram.com/queensofthestoneage 
https://www.tiktok.com/@qotsa 
https://x.com/qotsa 

Easy Street:
I’m chandeleering, now I’m fearing the worst
I hang from the ceiling, hear you pray for my curse
Those sposed to love me the most
Are breaking my heart
Wish I could share a bit more
Too petrified

The sound of your voice & the things that you say
Just shut up & fuck me or shut up & go away
You drive me crazy for sure
But I can do that myself

If you need me come & see me on Easy Street
I ain’t hard to find
Down on the floor, under the couch,
are the keys to life
Been there the whole time

“Violence is never the answer” you say?
I question how he’s not been punched in the face
I’m not like that anymore
Been dead a long time
I don’t believe in luck
So you can have mine

Drinking won’t help, but it sure blocks out the help
Don’t ruin the vibe, I do all that by myself
Sorry for your loss,
But you lost.

If you need me come & see me on Easy Street
I ain’t hard to find
Amazing to be lost in a maze, you made up in your mind.
Made up in your mind

snippet.title: DIGGER | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Digg. Or Die. DIGGER. Only in theaters October 2. #Diggermovie



Academy Award winner Tom Cruise stars in Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s original film “Digger,” from Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures.
The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity’s savior before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.
Cruise stars in the title role, alongside Oscar winner Riz Ahmed, John Goodman, Oscar nominee Sandra Hüller, Michael Stuhlbarg, and Oscar nominee Jesse Plemons.  Robert John Burke, Emma D’Arcy, Burn Gorman and Sophie Wilde also star. 
Iñárritu directed from a screenplay by Iñárritu & Oscar-winners Alexander Dinelaris & Nicolás Giacobone, and Sabina Berman, story by Iñárritu & Berman.  The film is produced by Iñárritu, Oscar nominee Mary Parent, Cruise and Michael Sharp, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Berman, Dinelaris, Giacobone, Jez Butterworth and Emmanuel Lubezki.
Joining Iñárritu behind the camera are previous collaborators Oscar-winning director of photography Emmanuel Lubezki; editors Conor O’Neill and Oscar winner Stephen Mirrone; Oscar-nominated costume designer Jacqueline West; Oscar-winning makeup and hair designer Alessandro Bertolazzi; and Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler; along with Oscar-winning production designer Dennis Gassner and production designer Richard Johnson, Oscar-winning prosthetic makeup designer Kazu Hiro, and composer Cosmo Sheldrake.
An Alejandro G. Iñárritu Film, “Digger” was shot entirely in VistaVision and will be released in theaters and IMAX® across North America on October 2, 2026, and internationally beginning 30 September 2026.  It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: She Knows (Official Video) | Chani Nattan | Jazzy B | Inderpal Moga | Intense | Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
The dream team is back! with the ultimate modern-meets-traditional Bhangra anthem.
This track brings back the legendary, high-voltage 90s/2000s energy of the "Crown Prince of Bhangra," Jazzy B, but gives it a sleek, modern punch. With sharp lyrics by Chani Nattan, a heavy bassline by Intense, and the gritty vocals of Inderpal Moga perfectly matching Jazzy B’s iconic high notes, this song is pure dancefloor fuel.

Get ready for heavy dhol rhythms and upbeat synths that will tear up every wedding dance floor. Old-school Bhangra is back and bigger than ever!

---------------------------

Wow! Been a while since I've uploaded, huh? Just so everyone is aware, but yes, the account was compromised and hacked. Luckily, Google/YouTube caught wind of it very fast and restricted the account. The resulted in the "Jacob Alpharad" channel disappearing for about a week... which was very scary!

Eventually, the staff at Google reinstated my account back to me, but I somehow lost access to my YouTube channel. Despite it being restored, it was still floating in the sea of nothingness without a proper owner. It was a very strange situation that the staff helping me said they have never seen before. So fast forward about 2 weeks later and I'm finally back and ready to start uploading again... I hope this one was worth the wait. :D

Lyrics for "Luke Combs - Fast Car"

You got a fast car
And I want a ticket to anywhere
Maybe we make a deal
Maybe together we can get somewhere

Any place is better
Starting from zero, got nothing to lose
Maybe we'll make something
Me, myself, I got nothing to prove

You got a fast car
And I got a plan to get us out of here
Been working at the convenience store
Managed to save just a little bit of money

Won't have to drive too far
Just across the border and into the city
And you and I can both get jobs
Finally see what it means to be living

See, my old man's got a problem
He lived with the bottle, that's the way it is
Said his body's too old for working
His body's too young to look like his

So, Mama went off and left him
She wanted more from life than he could give
I said, "Somebody's got to take care of him"
So, I quit school and that's what I did

You got a fast car
Is it fast enough so we could fly away?
Still gotta make a decision
Leave tonight, or live and die this way

So, I remember when we were driving, driving in your car
Speed so fast, I felt like I was drunk
City lights laid out before us
And your arm felt nice wrapped around my shoulder
And I, I had a feeling that I belonged
I, I had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone

You got a fast car
We go cruising, entertain ourselves
You still ain't got a job
So I work in the market as a checkout girl

I know things will get better
You'll find work and I'll get promoted
And we'll move out of the shelter
Buy a bigger house, live in the suburbs

So, I remember when we were driving, driving in your car
Speed so fast, I felt like I was drunk
City lights lay out before us
And your arm felt nice wrapped around my shoulder
And I, I had a feeling that I belonged
I, I had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone

You got a fast car
I got a job that pays all our bills
You stay out drinking late at the bar

snippet.title: Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)

Follow Lukas Graham:
https://www.instagram.com/lukasgraham
https://www.facebook.com/LukasGraham
https://www.tiktok.com/@lukasgraham

Lyrics:

[Chorus]
Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me
Go make yourself some friends, or you'll be lonely
Once, I was seven years old

[Verse 1]
It was a big, big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven, smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich, so we were out to make that steady figure

[Chorus]
Once, I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
Go get yourself a wife, or you'll be lonely
Once, I was eleven years old

[Verse 2]
I always had that dream like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

[Chorus]
Once, I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once, I was twenty years old (Lukas Graham!)

[Verse 3]
I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

[Chorus]
Once, I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once, I was twenty years old

[Bridge]
Soon, we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon, we'll be thirty years old

[Verse 4]
I'm still learning about life, 
my woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs, and I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me, some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind, 
my brother, I'm still sorry

[Chorus]
Soon, I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month
[Breakdown]
Soon, I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold?
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon, I'll be sixty years old
Soon, I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold?
Or will I have a lot of children who can hold me?
Soon, I'll be sixty years old

[Chorus]
Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends, or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old
Once I was seven years old

snippet.title: The Fifth Element - Official Re-release Trailer | Bruce Willis, Gary Oldman, Milla Jovovich
snippet.description:
The Fifth Element returns to theaters this month, with the release featuring an exclusive introduction by cinema critic and historian Leonard Maltin. Watch the trailer for The Fifth Element, the sci-fi action movie starring Bruce Willis, Gary Oldman, and Milla Jovovich. The Fifth Element returns to theaters on July 26 and July 27, 2026.

Bruce Willis stars as Korben Dallas, a New York cab driver turned unlikely hero, in this timeless story about love and survival set in the 23rd century. In this future world posited by acclaimed director of Lucy and The Professional, humanity has wandered out among the stars, spreading the life-energy of the universe and further agitating the dark force, whose time to strike back occurs only once every 5,000 years, when a doorway between the parallel dimensions briefly opens. That time is now, and Zorg (Gary Oldman), the agent of darkness, intends to take advantage of it. Humanity’s hopes may lie with Leeloo (Milla Jovovich), who represents the fifth element, the life force. Leeloo holds unimaginable powers, but she needs help, and Korben befriends her. Nothing less than the future of the universe is in their hands.

snippet.title: The Dog Stars | Official Trailer | In Theaters August 28
snippet.description:
The world that was doesn’t exist. THE DOG STARS, a Ridley Scott film, starring Jacob Elordi, Josh Brolin, and Margaret Qualley, arrives in theaters and IMAX August 28.

Based on Peter Heller’s captivating bestseller, “The Dog Stars” features a critically acclaimed ensemble, including Jacob Elordi, Josh Brolin, Margaret Qualley, Allison Janney, Benedict Wong, and Guy Pearce. The screenplay is by Mark L. Smith, based upon the novel by Peter Heller, and the producers are Ridley Scott, p.g.a., Michael Pruss, p.g.a., Mark L. Smith, and Cliff Roberts, p.g.a., with Lily Brooks-Dalton, Brandon Scott Smith, Peter Heller, Aidan Elliott serving as executive producers.
 
The film tells the story of Hig (Jacob Elordi), a young pilot who, together with a military survivalist, Bangley (Josh Brolin), has carved out an efficient but isolated homestead in a brutal post-apocalyptic world. But when Hig receives a mysterious radio transmission, he ventures into the unknown in search of the hope and humanity he still believes exist.

Born in Punjab, India, Manak's career spanned decades, during which he revolutionized the genre with his soulful renditions of traditional Punjabi folk songs. His rich, resonant voice conveyed deep emotions and cultural heritage, captivating audiences worldwide. Manak's contributions to Punjabi music are celebrated for preserving and evolving its roots, inspiring generations of musicians. His legacy endures through timeless classics that continue to enchant listeners, ensuring his place as an icon of Punjabi musical heritage.

snippet.title: THE JETSONS (2027) Live Action Trailer | Jim Carrey, Amy Adams | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#TheJetsons #JimCarrey #AmyAdams #liveaction 

THE JETSONS (2027) — Live Action Concept Trailer
We live above the clouds. Eight million people. And not one of us has ever touched the ground.
Sixty years ago humanity left Earth behind and built Orbit City... a gleaming metropolis floating in the sky where everything runs on its own. The cars fly themselves. The sidewalks carry you. The machines think for you. Nobody asks what holds it all together. Nobody looks down.
George Jetson is a maintenance tech at Spacely Space Sprockets. He is not a genius. He is not a hero. He is just a guy who shows up and stares at numbers nobody else cares about. But when those numbers start telling a story the whole city is ignoring... George becomes the only person standing between eight million lives and the fall.
With his wife by his side... his kids behind him... an old robot who refuses to be left behind... and a dog who was already in the car... the Jetsons go where no family has gone in three generations.
Below the clouds. Below everything. Back to Earth.
The future runs on family.
